mapper.select: SELECT S.SSNT_YR, S.SSNT_STTS_CD, C.CD_NM AS SSNT_STTS_NM, S.SSNT_BGNG_DT, S.REG_SSNT_BGNG_DT, S.REG_SSNT_END_DT, S.PSTSSNT_BGNG_DT, S.PSTSSNT_END_DT, S.SSNT_END_DT, S.CUR_DT FROM SSNT S LEFT JOIN CMN_CD C ON C.CD_ID = 'SSNT_STTS' AND C.CD_VAL = S.SSNT_STTS_CD ORDER BY S.SSNT_YR DESC

SELECT S.SSNT_YR, S.SSNT_STTS_CD, C.CD_NM AS SSNT_STTS_NM, S.SSNT_BGNG_DT, S.REG_SSNT_BGNG_DT, S.REG_SSNT_END_DT, S.PSTSSNT_BGNG_DT, S.PSTSSNT_END_DT, S.SSNT_END_DT, S.CUR_DT FROM SSNT S LEFT JOIN CMN_CD C ON C.CD_ID = 'SSNT_STTS' AND C.CD_VAL = S.SSNT_STTS_CD WHERE S.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr}

SELECT ST.TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM, T.TM_SHRT_KR_NM, ST.SSNT_YR, ST.W, ST.L, ST.T, ST.PCT, ST.GB, ST.HOME_W, ST.HOME_L, ST.AWAY_W, ST.AWAY_L, ST.RS, ST.RA, ST.RUN_DIFF, ST.STRK_TYPE, ST.STRK_CNT, ST.L10_W, ST.L10_L, ST.L10_T, ST.STND_RNK, ST.TM_MORL, ST.FAN_STSFCTN, ST.OWN_STSFCTN, ST.PSTSSNT_STTS FROM STND ST JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = ST.TM_ID WHERE ST.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} ORDER BY ST.STND_RNK

SELECT ST.TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM, T.TM_SHRT_KR_NM, ST.SSNT_YR, ST.W, ST.L, ST.T, ST.PCT, ST.GB, ST.HOME_W, ST.HOME_L, ST.AWAY_W, ST.AWAY_L, ST.RS, ST.RA, ST.RUN_DIFF, ST.STRK_TYPE, ST.STRK_CNT, ST.L10_W, ST.L10_L, ST.L10_T, ST.STND_RNK, ST.TM_MORL, ST.FAN_STSFCTN, ST.OWN_STSFCTN, ST.PSTSSNT_STTS FROM STND ST JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = ST.TM_ID WHERE ST.TM_ID = #{tmId} ORDER BY ST.SSNT_YR DESC

SELECT E.EVNT_ID, E.SSNT_YR, E.EVNT_DT, E.TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM, E.PLR_ID, P.PLR_NM, E.EVNT_TYPE_CD, C.CD_NM AS EVNT_TYPE_NM, E.EVNT_TTLT, E.EVNT_CNTS, E.RD_YN FROM SSNT_EVNT E LEFT JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = E.TM_ID LEFT JOIN PLR P ON P.PLR_ID = E.PLR_ID LEFT JOIN CMN_CD C ON C.CD_ID = 'EVNT_TYPE' AND C.CD_VAL = E.EVNT_TYPE_CD WHERE E.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND E.TM_ID = #{tmId} AND E.EVNT_TYPE_CD = #{evntTypeCd} ORDER BY E.EVNT_DT DESC, E.EVNT_ID DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
